nodes.name: apple-touch-icon.png
nodes.description: Apple touch icon (PNG) for KalkMate website. Black-on-white calculator outline icon featuring a stylized display showing a math/graph waveform and a keypad grid. Used by iOS Safari when users add the KalkMate site to their home screen; serves as branding/favicon asset.

nodes.summary: 96x96 PNG favicon for browser tab displaying the KalkMate calculator logo.
nodes.description: Favicon image (96x96 PNG) showing a stylized black-and-white KalkMate calculator icon with a display and keypad. Used as the browser tab icon for the KalkMate marketing/product website.

nodes.summary: SVG favicon (600x780) for KalkMate website with nested svg elements containing vector path data depicting a stylized calculator/device icon; includes embedded CSS media-query style block that inverts colors in dark color-scheme.
nodes.notes: Triple-nested <svg> tags; viewBox 700 480 600 780; transform translate(0,2000) scale(0.1,-0.1); fill #000000; multiple <path> elements forming calculator silhouette with keypad cells; embedded <style> uses prefers-color-scheme media queries (light: filter none; dark: filter invert(100%)).

nodes.summary: Next.js boilerplate file icon SVG (default static asset).
Next.js default globe icon SVG asset in website public directory.

nodes.label: KalkMate.png
nodes.description: Main product hero image for KalkMate. Photograph (studio shot on white background) of an Esperanza-branded silver/black 12-digit electronic desktop calculator with solar cell, MC/MR/M-/M+ memory keys, arithmetic keys and a dot-matrix LCD screen displaying the word 'KalkMate' in pixel font. Serves as the primary product photo / marketing hero visual presenting the KalkMate AI-assisted calculator concept on the project website's public assets.

nodes.summary: Marketing/product photograph of the KalkMate device — a hand holding an Esperanza-branded 12-digit electronic calculator whose OLED display shows the 'KalkMate' wordmark, against an electronics workbench background featuring an oscilloscope displaying a sine wave, a soldering iron station, a multimeter, a spool of solder, breadboards, prototype PCBs, and component bins under a desk lamp. Conveys the product's identity as a DIY/hardware-hacked educational calculator and is used as a hero/showcase image on the KalkMate website.

nodes.name: KalkMate3.png
nodes.summary: Product marketing image showing two Esperanza-branded desktop calculators on a dark glossy surface. The foreground calculator (silver bezel, black keys) displays 'KalkMate' as dot-matrix text on its segmented LCD. The background calculator (darker grey) displays '= 42' on its LCD. Both units show standard 12-digit calculator layouts with MC/MR/M-/M+/MU memory keys, C/CE, +/- sign toggle, digits 0-9, decimal point, basic arithmetic operators, and a percent key. Cinematic studio lighting with reflections on the desk surface. Used as a hero/promotional render for the KalkMate product website, illustrating the form-factor concept: a familiar pocket calculator reimagined as an AI-assisted matura-exam solver.

nodes.label: KalkMate4.png
nodes.summary: Photograph of a hand holding the KalkMate prototype PCB in a home electronics workbench. The green PCB shows a 5x5 keypad matrix of through-hole tactile switches populated on the lower portion, with surface-mount components and an OLED display module mounted at the top displaying the text 'KalkMate' in white pixels. Wires (yellow, red, black) connect from the board to a small breadboard resting on the desk. Background shows a lit Rigol digital oscilloscope displaying square waveforms on its screen, a yellow Fluke multimeter, a soldering station with sponge holder on the left, a spool of solder wire, scattered electronic components (transistors, resistors), and tools on a wooden desk surface. Warm overhead lighting from a desk lamp illuminates the scene. The photo documents the bring-up / debugging phase of the first assembled KalkMate prototype board.

nodes.label: KalkMate5.png
nodes.summary: Marketing/build photo showing a green KalkMate PCB on an electronics workbench with Hakko soldering station, multimeter, oscilloscope, solder spool, tweezers, flush cutters, and SMD components (resistors/capacitors) laid out for assembly.
nodes.description: Photograph of a green square KalkMate printed circuit board (silkscreen visible, traces and mounting holes for components) placed on a dark workbench mat. Surrounding tools and equipment include: a Hakko soldering iron resting in its blue stand with brass sponge, a yellow/red Fluke-style digital multimeter with probes, a digital oscilloscope displaying a green waveform, a spool of solder wire, precision tweezers, red-handled flush diagonal cutters, and small SMD components (chip resistors/capacitors) on cut tape strips in the foreground. Background shows blue parts bins/storage drawers and additional PCBs, suggesting a hardware prototyping / electronics lab setting. Likely used on the KalkMate marketing website as a hero or about-section image illustrating the hardware development process.

nodes.label: kalkmate_icon.svg
nodes.description: KalkMate brand icon — a 200x200 SVG with viewBox 835 585 330 555 containing a single transformed group of black filled paths rendering a stylized calculator outline with rows of key cutouts. Standalone vector asset (no script/style); serves as the product logo/favicon in the website's public directory.

nodes.name: kalkmate_logo.svg

text_elements.note: Letters are not real <text> elements; they are traced bezier paths produced by potrace from a raster source. Visible letterforms spell 'KMATE' beneath a calculator/device icon containing a small keypad-like grid of rounded rectangles.

visual_elements: inner display area with small triangular/peak marks (possibly representing a mountain or chart, evoking 'mate'/study)
3x2 grid of rounded square keys (calculator buttons)
nodes.usage_context: Public static asset served by the KalkMate marketing/web app (website/public/). Used as the primary brand logo on the site.

nodes.label: kalkmate_text.svg
nodes.summary: SVG wordmark logo rendering the 'KalkMate' brand text as vector paths (800x120 viewBox, black fill).

nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-kamera-odkryta.png
nodes.description: Product photograph showing the back side of the KalkMate calculator enclosure on a white background. The black plastic housing is visible with two screws at the top corners, two rubber feet at the bottom corners, and a recessed rectangular cutout in the lower-center area exposing the camera module aperture (small circular camera lens visible inside the cutout). Top of the device shows the tapered upper section of the case.

nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-ukryta-kamera-zamknieta.png
nodes.description: Marketing/product photograph showing the back (underside) of a black Esperanza ECL102 electronic calculator with the hidden camera compartment closed. The rear casing is plain matte black with two visible screws at the top, a centered manufacturer label reading 'ELECTRONIC CALCULATOR — POWERED BY AG10 1.5V BATTERY — Esperanza ECL102 — Made by ?' along with CE/WEEE/recycling icons and a QR code with serial number 5688. Two rubber feet are visible at the bottom corners. The image emphasizes the discreet, ordinary appearance of the device when the embedded KalkMate camera module is concealed — a key product positioning point (covert AI camera for matura exam assistance disguised as a standard school calculator). Asset is part of the website's public image folder, likely used in landing-page galleries or product showcase sections to demonstrate the closed/stealth state of the hidden camera mechanism.

nodes.label: vercel.svg
nodes.summary: Vercel logo SVG, default Next.js boilerplate asset.

nodes.label: web-app-manifest-192x192.png
nodes.description: PWA web app manifest icon (192x192 PNG) displaying the KalkMate logo: a stylized black-and-white calculator with a graph/chart waveform on its screen. Used by the Progressive Web App manifest for installable app icon at standard 192px resolution on Android home screens and app launchers.

nodes.name: web-app-manifest-512x512.png
nodes.summary: PWA manifest icon (512x512 PNG) depicting the KalkMate logo: a stylized calculator outline with a brain and EKG/waveform on the display and number-key buttons below, used as the high-resolution app icon referenced by the web app manifest for installable PWA on Android/desktop.

nodes.description: Next.js boilerplate window icon SVG asset in the website public directory.

nodes.label: inteligentny-kalkulator-produkt-finalny.png
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photo showing the final KalkMate product staged as a desktop study scene. A silver-and-black Esperanza electronic calculator (12 digits, branded 'KalkMate' on its dot-matrix display) sits at center on a white marble surface. Around it: an open chemistry textbook with equations (top-left), a white mug of black coffee (top-right), four pastel Stabilo-style highlighters in pink/yellow/green/blue (right), white wired earphones coiled below the calculator, a black smartphone (bottom-right), and three pastel sticky notes (pink, yellow, mint) with handwritten study labels 'MOLAR MASS', 'STOICHIOMETRY TEST', and 'REVIEW CH. 4'. Flat-lay top-down composition suggesting a student exam-prep / chemistry study aesthetic.

nodes.label: inteligentny-kalkulator-rozwiazywanie-zadan.jpg
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photo for KalkMate website showing a user holding the KalkMate calculator (white desktop-style calculator with 'KalkMate' branding on its OLED display) on their lap while riding a tram. Next to the calculator is an open formula sheet (Polish matura 'Wzory' reference card) with physics/math formulas visible. Through the tram window one can see urban apartment buildings, tram tracks, overhead power lines, and a yellow STOP request button. Tram seats and another passenger's bag are visible. The photo conveys the product's use case: a portable AI-powered calculator helping a Polish student solve exam problems on the go, as an alternative to expensive tutoring.
nodes.summary: Lifestyle/marketing photo of KalkMate calculator in use on a tram with a Polish matura formula sheet.

nodes.label: kalkulator-ai-interfejs-uzytkownika.png
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photograph for the KalkMate website showing the KalkMate AI calculator device held in a hand in a school corridor setting. The calculator has a classic desktop-calculator form factor in white/grey plastic with a dark display area prominently showing the 'KalkMate' brand name/logo on screen. Visible keypad includes standard calculator keys (MC, MR, M-, M+, digits 0-9, operators +, -, x, division, =, %, square root, decimal point, AC/ON, OFF) plus what appears to be a play/action button. The background is an out-of-focus school hallway with blue lockers, fluorescent ceiling lights, and students, emphasizing the product's target context: Polish high school students preparing for the matura exam. Used as a hero/gallery image showcasing the user interface and real-world usage scenario of the AI-powered educational calculator.

nodes.label: kalkulator-ai-pomocy-edukacyjne.jpg
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photo for KalkMate showing the KalkMate calculator in a real school context. A student's hand (wearing colorful friendship bracelets) is pulling/placing the silver KalkMate calculator out of an open dark blue backpack. The calculator's LCD display clearly shows the 'KalkMate' branding text. Inside the open backpack are visible school items: a pencil case, notebooks with grid/squared paper, and tangled black headphones. The scene is set in a school hallway with blue lockers along the left wall, a red fire extinguisher mounted on the wall, ceiling lights, and a light-colored tiled floor. Other students' legs (in jeans) are visible in the background. The image conveys the product as an everyday educational AI helper for students in a school environment — emphasizing portability, daily school use, and integration into typical student life.

nodes.label: kalkulator-graficzny-ai-ekran-lcd.png
nodes.description: Gallery photo showing a study scene on a bed: an open laptop displaying a blue KalkMate-related screen, a scientific/graphing calculator placed on the duvet next to open math/textbooks and notebooks, illuminated by a desk lamp. Used as marketing imagery on the KalkMate website to portray the AI calculator with LCD screen in a real student study context.

nodes.label: kalkulator-graficzny-kalkmate-technologia-ai.png
nodes.description: Outdoor lifestyle marketing photo for KalkMate website gallery. Scene shows a weathered green-painted wooden park bench in a sunlit park with trees and another bench visible in the background. On the bench sits a KalkMate calculator (branded 'KalkMate' on its black upper case, white body, grey numeric keypad) next to an open spiral notebook filled with handwritten math/chemistry notes including molecular structures and equations. Also on the bench: a pair of sunglasses, a sandwich on parchment paper, and a bottle of mineral water. Promotes KalkMate as a study companion for outdoor/student use, tying the AI calculator product to a real-world learning context.

nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-platforma-pcb-elektronika.png
nodes.description: Marketing/branding photograph (not an actual PCB view despite the filename). Close-up of a black Esperanza 'ELECTRONIC CALCULATOR' device with the KalkMate brand name displayed on a segmented/dot-matrix-style LCD/OLED display. Visible keypad buttons in the lower portion include MU, %, divide, square root, M+, MR, and digit 9, characteristic of a consumer calculator interface. The image represents the KalkMate product/platform identity rather than exposing PCB traces or electronic components.
visible_elements: Keypad buttons: MU, %, divide, square root, M+, MR, 9

nodes.label: kalkulator-kalkmate-prototyp-widok-ogolny.png
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photo showing the KalkMate prototype calculator in a real-world study scenario. The scene depicts a wooden library/study table with the black KalkMate calculator prototype placed prominently in the foreground next to an open notebook filled with handwritten notes. A stack of physics textbooks (with 'PHYSICS' visible on a spine) sits to the left, reinforcing the educational/exam-preparation context. In the background, a student is seated at the same table working, with tall bookshelves, arched windows, and a classic library interior providing ambiance. The image serves as lifestyle/context photography for the KalkMate product website gallery, illustrating the intended use case: a Polish high-school student using the AI-assisted calculator for matura exam preparation (mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology). Aspect ratio is wide/landscape, with warm natural lighting suggesting daytime study session.
